name: Minimal Bubble Pop
short_description: Aim your bubbles and blast away! Match 3 of the same bubbles with your cannon to reach new top scores!
detailed_description: Simple and fun gameplay aming your way to match 3 bubble colors and pop them out to increase your score. Don't let the bubbles fall below the line! Keep your score high with bubble management skills.
about_the_game: Simple and fun gameplay aming your way to match 3 bubble colors and pop them out to increase your score. Don't let the bubbles fall below the line! Keep your score high with bubble management skills.
supported_languages:
English*, French, Italian, German, Spanish - Spain, Arabic, Bulgarian, Czech, Danish, Dutch, Finnish, Greek, Hungarian, Japanese, Korean, Norwegian, Polish, Portuguese - Portugal, Portuguese - Brazil, Romanian, Russian, Simplified Chinese, Spanish - Latin America, Swedish, Thai, Traditional Chinese, Turkish, Ukrainian, Vietnamese
*languages with full audio support
